task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor window title bar should display 'esa_formatted.docx'.

task_completion.description: The document is divided into the four required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual indicators of page breaks or section breaks immediately before 'Executive Summary', 'Site Maps and Data Tables', and 'Appendices'. In LibreOffice, this may appear as a blue dashed line between pages or distinct page styles in the status bar.

task_completion.description: The 'Site Maps/Data' section is set to Landscape orientation while others remain Portrait.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page containing 'Site Maps and Data Tables' is visibly wider than it is tall (Landscape), while the pages before and after it are taller than they are wide (Portrait).

task_completion.description: Headers are correctly configured with the project ID and site name, except on the Cover Page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ESA-2024-0472' and 'Former Kerrigan Manufacturing Facility' is visible in the top margin (header area) of the pages starting from the Executive Summary. The Cover Page must have no text in its top margin.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the footers of all sections except the Cover Page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible in the bottom margin (footer area) of the pages starting from the Executive Summary. The Cover Page must have no page number in its bottom margin.

task_completion.description: Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles are applied to the appropriate titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Main section titles (e.g., 'Executive Summary', 'Introduction') and subsections (e.g., 'Purpose', 'Scope and Limitations') are visually formatted as headings (larger, bold). The style dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' when these titles are selected.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice Writer (or a similar word processor) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing a python script (e.g., python-docx) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual header and footer features of the word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The header/footer text is located within the designated header/footer boundary boxes (often indicated by a blue tag or dashed lines when clicked), not just typed as regular text at the very top or bottom of the page body.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual styles rather than just manually changing font size and weight.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the Styles dropdown menu or Styles pane to select 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2', rather than just clicking the 'Bold' button and increasing the font size manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as 'esa_formatted.docx'. The header text must be exactly 'ESA-2024-0472' and 'Former Kerrigan Manufacturing Facility'. Heading 1 titles that must be styled include: Executive Summary, Introduction, Site Description, Records Review, Site Reconnaissance, Findings and Opinions, Conclusions and Recommendations, References, Site Maps and Data Tables, Appendices. Heading 2 titles that must be styled include: Purpose, Scope and Limitations, Location and Legal Description, Current Use and Conditions, Environmental Database Review, Historical Use Records, Methodology, Observations.
